title: Trofers for Isle of Berk
description: Trofers mod Compat with Isle of Berk.
body:
THIS IS DATAPACK ADD TROFERS COMPATIBILITY WITH ISLE OF BERK



**FEATURES:**
Isle of Berk only ALL DRAGONS!


**Optional:**
Scale 1 for Terrible Terror cuz too tiny
Scale 0.50 for Speed Stinger cuz look alike baby or small
Be can use FTB Quest or KubeJS
